title: Postfix Verifier — Exploit Retest & Fix Confidence Scoring
description: postfix_verifier.py closes the Find→Fix→VERIFY loop with static+AST vulnerability elimination checks, regression detection, safe dependency verification, MPTE exploit retest, and test coverage estimation. This is ALDECI's primary differentiator. Gap: MPTE exploit retest is implemented but calls a stub HTTP client rather than the real MPTE scanner, and the fix confidence score (0-100) is not surfaced in the UI.
missing: Real MPTE exploit retest: wire the MPTE retest step to the real MPTE scan engine (suite-attack/mpte/) with the original exploit payload replayed
Fix confidence score UI: surface the 0-100 fix confidence score in the vuln_lifecycle detail page alongside the finding status
Regression detection CI gate: integrate postfix_verifier into the CI pipeline so a PR that introduces a new CWE fails the check automatically
